creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
On Jun 26, 2009, at 12:44 PM, Wesley Shields <wxs@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> On Thu, Jun 18, 2009 at 04:50:02AM +0000, Anton Kropachev wrote:
>> Thanks for help.
>> I'll try to connect with postfix-users.
>
> Any word on if this is confirmed to not be a ports issue? Should I  
> leave
> this PR open or close

I was going to ask the same thing but figured I'd give Anton the  
weekend.:). I have not seen him post the question on the users or dev  
list upstream.
